items.title: Lords of the Fallen 2 dodges crowded fall 2026, delayed to 2027
items.summary: Originally due out later this year, the Soulslike sequel dodges Grand Theft Auto 6

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 puts another body in the trunk: Lords of the Fallen 2 is delayed to early 2027
items.summary: The delay will provide developers with more time for "iteration and polishing," and will also let CI Games avoid "a highly competitive holiday period."

items.title: Lords Of The Fallen 2 Bails On A ‘Highly Competitive Holiday Period’ With New Delay
items.summary: GTA 6 is still scaring everyone away

items.title: GTA 6's leaked prices are "possible and plausible," analysts say, but a high barrier to entry "would be penny-wise and pound-foolish"
items.summary: The leaked prices were likely just placeholders, but some analysts say they could be accurate

items.title: Lords Of The Fallen 2 Delayed To Avoid GTA 6 And Get More “Enhancements”
items.summary: Lords of the Fallen 2 is not going to make it out on time. Developer CI Games has announced that the game is shifting from 2026 to Q1 2027 (January-March 2027). CI Games CEO Marek Tyminski said feedback and tests showed that there are "meaningful opportunities" available to "further refine and strengthen the overall…

items.title: If there's any reason to upgrade your gaming setup it's GTA 6, and Prime Day deals have you completely covered
items.summary: There's lots of kit you need to pick up ahead of GTA 6's release, and Prime Day makes them all much cheaper.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 'VIP early access' scam sites are already popping up, Malwarebytes warns
£80, £90, £100? How much will Grand Theft Auto 6 cost? We ask the experts ahead of pre-orders opening this week
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is set to release in November with pre-orders going live this week, on 25th June - an occasion Rockstar announced with a short video revealing GTA 6's cover art . That teaser alone has already clocked up 10m views on YouTube. To say anticipation is high for the next mainline GTA instalment would b…

items.title: This $1,000 Steam Game Offers Very Little, But At Least It’s Honest About It
items.summary: With people wondering if GTA 6 preorders will kickstart a new $80 era for standard edition PS5 and Xbox Series X|S games, one new release on Steam already has Rockstar Games beat: Congratulations On Your Purchase. The new red carpet-simulator launched not too long ago, and it can be yours for the mere price of $1,00…

items.title: GTA 6’s “Leaked” Sky-High Prices May Be Placeholders, But Could Be “Possible And Plausible”
items.summary: GTA 6 preorders go live on June 25 , and ahead of that, one retailer posted listings for the game showing higher-than-expected price points. A prominent and reliable reporter, however, has said those were just placeholders. At the same time, industry analysts have weighed in on the price points, saying they may not…

items.title: Rockstar quietly gives us probably our best look at GTA 6's Vice City yet
items.summary: Along with today's cover art reveal, Rockstar has also quietly revealed its best visual overview so far of Grand Theft Auto 6 's crime-laiden metropolis, Vice City. Read more

items.title: Rockstar reveals the Grand Theft Auto 6 box art, which is quite nice I suppose, and pre-order dates for the game
items.summary: Rockstar Games has revealed the box art for Grand Theft Auto 6 , which looks a lot like you'd expect it to look, and it's revealed pre-order dates for the new game. Read more

items.title: As GTA Online readies for another large update, and GTA 6 approaches, Rockstar offers free upgrades to GTA 5 on PS5 and Xbox Series S/X
items.summary: In a surprise move, Grand Theft Auto developer Rockstar Games is giving players of GTA 5 on PS4 or Xbox One a free upgrade to GTA 5 on PS5 or Xbox Series X/S. Read more

items.title: "Rockstar thought they could control the narrative. They're wrong" - tribunal rules against GTA 6 developer's request to remove union's blacklisting claims from ongoing legal dispute
items.summary: An employment tribunal has ruled against Rockstar Games ' request to remove blacklisting claims from the ongoing legal dispute over alleged union busting at the Grand Theft Auto 6 studio. Read more

items.title: "GTA is like the ogre" - It's an "odd" year to release a video game, says A Plague Tale studio Asobo
items.summary: A Plague Tale developer Asobo has called Grand Theft Auto 6 an "ogre" as far as its dominance over 2026's release schedule goes. It's the same year its Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy game comes out, and it joins the crush in late August, a couple of months before GTA 6 crashes in. Read more
